InstructionData.Title: Solar v0.3
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
init: alias Solarpanels d0 alias SolarSensorHorz d1 alias SolarSensorVert d2 alias SolarSensorTest d5 alias Display1 d3 alias Display2 d4
alias rVert r1 alias rHorz r2
s SolarSensorHorz Mode 1 s SolarSensorTest Mode 2 s Display1 Color 0 s Display2 Color 0
loop1: l rVert SolarSensorVert SolarAngle l rHorz SolarSensorHorz SolarAngle mul rVert rVert -0.6667 add rVert rVert 110 sub rHorz 270 rHorz s Display1 Setting rHorz s Display2 Setting rVert s Solarpanels Vertical rVert s Solarpanels Horizontal rHorz sleep 1 j loop1
